title: The Music of Strangers: Yo-Yo Ma and the Silk Road Ensemble
original_title: The Music of Strangers: Yo-Yo Ma and the Silk Road Ensemble
overview: Follow several talented members of the ensemble as they gather in locations across the world, exploring the ways art can both preserve traditions and shape cultural evolution.
